title: Lab 38: SELinux Boolean
description: Modify a SELinux boolean persistently without changing enforcing mode

tasks: On client, configure the SELinux boolean httpd_can_network_connect so it is enabled persistently while SELinux remains in enforcing mode.
hints: Use a persistent SELinux boolean command.
checks: getsebool httpd_can_network_connect | grep -q -- "--> on" && getenforce | grep -qx Enforcing
solution_outline: Enable the boolean persistently without changing SELinux mode.
task_titles: Enable the SELinux boolean while keeping enforcing mode
